wave: Wave 10: Realtime Hygiene / Channel Ownership Stabilization

inventory.actionTaken: replaced unstable timestamp-based name with deterministic screen-scoped identity
kept wire value unchanged and centralized shared ownership constants

namingDecision.finding: RT4 director channel used timestamp-based identity on each mount
namingDecision.oldIdentityWhyUnstable: Date.now() generated needless unique channel names for the same screen lifecycle owner
namingDecision.newIdentityWhySafe: director:screen:realtime is deterministic for the same screen scope and does not change event bindings, auth, cleanup, or broadcast semantics

uniquenessStillRequiredAnywhere.reason: none for name uniqueness; stable shared broadcast wire channel remains correct
